nasb.text: Then Samson called to the Lord and said, “O Lord God, please remember me and please strengthen me just this time, O God, that I may at once be avenged of the Philistines for my two eyes.”

esv.text: Then Samson called to the Lord and said, “O Lord God, please remember me and please strengthen me only this once, O God, that I may be avenged on the Philistines for my two eyes.”

cnv.text: 參孫呼求耶和華，說：“主耶和華啊，求你記念我；　神啊，求你加強我這一次的力量，只這一次罷了，使我盡一次在非利士人身上報那剜我雙眼的仇！”

ccb.text: 参孙向耶和华祷告说：“主耶和华啊，求你眷顾我！上帝啊，求你再次赐给我力量，使我向非利士人报剜眼之仇。”
